calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions Regarding Retention Of Trust Property.
Off Calendar Jun-21-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Minton for Bank of America.

The Court confirms the decision of the Trustee to maintain the property subject to the ongoing fiduciary duty to monitor the investments. The Court granted the Petition for Instructions (subject to modifying the wording of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Mann.

Petition For Instructions Regarding Retention Of Trust Property.
Off Calendar May-07-2013 Continued To Jun-18-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Minton for Bank of America.

The Petition for Instructions Regarding Retention of Trust Property was continued to June 18, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to file a supplemental declaration, a memorandum of points and authorities addressing the prudent investment rule, how these holdings apply to the rule, how paragraph 21B on page 7 of the trust document applies, and how much income is being generated. The Court also stated that Counsel may want to file consent from all beneficiaries.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Nancy Bautista/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

payments.description: PETN AND OPP RE INTERNAL AFFAIRS OF 17200 TRUST
